name: P R Brown Bus Inc
notes: Company is P.R. Brown Busing, Inc. (also referenced as Paul R. Brown Busing), owned by Paul Brown. Contracts with Clarion Area School District (PA) since 2019; 3-yr contract approved June 2022 at $390,000/year. No SAFER/FMCSA carrier snapshot match could be confirmed under variations 'P R BROWN', 'P R BROWN BUSING', 'BROWN BUSING', 'PAUL BROWN' for New Bethlehem/Curllsville address. PA Department of State business search at corporations.pa.gov was inaccessible (TLS error / no public web fetch). Listed as Paul R Brown at 16242 on Manta. Inc/entity date unknown without PA registry access.

name: Polonez Bus Svc Inc
notes: Polonez Bus Service Inc appears in directories at Mount Pocono, PA and Stroudsburg, PA 18360 (Yellow Pages lists Stroudsburg location as CLOSED). Related-but-distinct entity 'Polonez Tour Service Inc' (USDOT 526494, MC-169202) is INACTIVE per SAFER, with PA address 213 Shinehill Rd Henryville PA 18332 and mailing 159 Nassau Ave Brooklyn NY 11222 (7 power units, 4 drivers, in MCMIS since 1993-06-08) — Shinehill Rd is similar to but distinct from 403 Shine Hill Rd Scotrun in the input. No direct SAFER hit for 'POLONEZ BUS' or 'POLONEZ BUS SERVICE'. PA Dept of State registry not accessible via WebFetch. Confidence low because tour-service entity may or may not be same operator.

Input record had blank hq/address; SAFER address is Columbia Cross Roads, PA 16914 — consistent with PA listing. PA Dept of State entity registry not accessible via WebFetch — incorporation date treated as 'unknown' (1998 is FMCSA registration date, not corp filing).

name: Lech Transportation

name: Agg School Transportation LLC
notes: No SAFER carrier snapshot was located for 'AGG SCHOOL TRANSPORTATION' (zero records returned). Two same-name carriers exist but neither matches the Hialeah, FL address: (1) AGG TRANSPORTATION LLC, USDOT 3210826, MC-1002628, at 1692 Kramer St NE Apt 2, Washington DC 20002 (1 power unit, 1 driver, Intrastate Non-HM, ACTIVE); (2) AGG TRANSPORTATION LLC DBA Garcia Transportation, USDOT 4063532, at 6601 Eucalyptus Dr 268, Bakersfield CA 93306 (1 power unit, ACTIVE). Florida Sunbiz registry was inaccessible via WebFetch (HTTP 403); could not confirm a Florida LLC by exact name 'AGG SCHOOL TRANSPORTATION LLC' at 1070 W 47th St Hialeah, FL 33012. Other Hialeah-area school bus carriers like AIR B SCHOOL BUS TRANSPORTATION (USDOT 1218485), J C ARVER SCHOOL BUS TRANSPORTATION, and Madruga School Bus were found but are distinct entities. Possible the entity is small/new, dissolved, or filed under a slightly different legal name.
